title: Boorka

{{Quote|Boorka has gone too far this time. He's mixed up with the Confederacy, running credits and supplies through a hidden base out in the desert. Smuggling's one thing, but this is too risky!|Jabba Desilijic Tiure, to Echuu Shen-Jon|translated=1|audio=JabbaHatesBoorka.flac|<ref name="GB:CC" />}}
'''Boorka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who operated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Boorka received information from [[Bogeega Bu'Daay]], an operative on the planet [[Eredenn Prime]], about a new series of [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapons]] that the Republic was building known as the [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimators]]. Boorka made it known that the information was available to the highest bidder and his offer was soon taken up by the Confederacy, who sent a contingent of its [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid army]] led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] to Tatooine.

Boorka agreed to trade his information to the Separatists if they destroyed a [[Republic spaceport (Mos Osnoe)|Republic spaceport]] near the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Mos Osnoe]]. The spaceport was interfering with the profits of the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]], a criminal organization that Boorka was a part of, and the Separatist [[Army/Legends|army]] was able to [[First Battle of Tatooine|accomplish]] the task. Boorka then gave his information to the Separatists, leading them to ultimately gain control of the Decimators and take over the Republic energy-producing [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]]. When the Republic [[Recapture of Sarapin|retook]] Sarapin, [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] discovered that the Hutt Cartel had knowledge of General Tann's location, and Shen-Jon soon learned that Boorka had begun a partnership with the Separatists and had allowed them to set up a secret trade operation on Tatooine. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] led his [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|army]] to [[Second Battle of Tatooine|attack]] Boorka's forces, [[Death/Legends|killing]] the Hutt in the process and removing the Separatists from Tatooine.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Sev'rance Tann will go to Mos Osnoe and contact Boorka the Hutt, a crime boss who we believe possesses vital information regarding a new weapon being developed by the Republic.|Count Dooku|audio=DookuHuttBriefing.flac|<ref name="GB:CC" />}}
Boorka was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and was a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] with ties to the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]]. Around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-spanning conflict known as the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], which was fought between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], a Cartel operative named [[Bogeega Bu'Daay]] contacted Boorka from the planet [[Eredenn Prime]], having discovered secret intelligence relating to a Republic [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] known as the [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimator]] that members of the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] species were developing. Bu'Daay told Boorka everything that had been unearthed about the Decimator, such as its weapon and [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] capabilities, assuring the Hutt that he could use the knowledge to his advantage. Boorka told Bu'Daay to continue observing the Decimator research, but the Wookiees working on the superweapon discovered the operative and intercepted the transmission, preventing any further observations.<ref name="GB:CC" />

[[File:First_Battle_of_Tatooine.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Sev'rance Tann meeting with Boorka]]
Boorka then made it known that he had information about a secret Republic superweapon and was willing to sell it to the highest bidder. His offer was accepted by Separatist forces under the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]], who had been ordered by the Confederate [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] to retrieve the information by any means necessary. Tann arrived on Tatooine with a small part of the Separatist [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid army]], which she led to [[Boorka's Palace]] near the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Osnoe]]. Boorka had some of his men hide along the path to ambush Tann's [[Army/Legends|army]], but the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] [[First Battle of Tatooine|defeated]] and [[Death/Legends|killed]] them. Upon Tann's arrival at Boorka's Palace, the Hutt commented that he liked her military leadership, and then began explaining his terms for the Separatists to acquire the secret intelligence in his possession. Boorka stated that the Republic had set up a [[Republic spaceport (Mos Osnoe)|spaceport]] outside of Mos Osnoe to benefit from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] trading profits to help pay for the war, but the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] was interfering with the Hutt Cartel's own profits. Therefore, Boorka told Tann that he would give her the information if her army destroyed the spaceport; after Tann's forces defeated the Republic [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] around the spaceport and destroyed it, Boorka gave her his knowledge of the Decimator and its production on Eredden Prime.<ref name="GB:CC" />

Boorka continued his partnership with the Separatists and ran [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and supplies to them through a [[Confederacy way station|hidden base]] established on Tatooine. Using the Hutt's intelligence, the CIS were able to seize the Decimators and used them to [[Assault on Sarapin|capture]] the Republic energy-producing planet [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]]. In response, the Republic sent [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Naat Reath]] to [[Recapture of Sarapin|retake]] the planet, and during the battle, Confederate [[Officer]] [[Zian Finnis]] told the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] that the Hutt Cartel had knowledge of Tann's location. Intending to catch Tann for killing [[Stam Reath|Stam]], his first Padawan and Naat's brother, Shen-Jon led his forces to Tatooine and met with another member of the Cartel, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], who was also one of Boorka's rivals. Jabba told the Jedi of Boorka's alliance with the Separatists and informed them of their hidden base, an operation that enraged Jabba, as it competed with his own. Shen-Jon agreed to destroy the way station, but Jabba refused to be seen fighting a fellow Hutt, leaving the Republic forces to confront the Separatists on their own.<ref name="GB:CC" /> The Republic [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|army]] [[Second Battle of Tatooine|attacked]] Boorka's hideout and [[Death/Legends|killed]] the Hutt,<ref name="CWCG" /> and also obliterated the Separatist way-station. As a reward for eliminating his competitor, Jabba gave Shen-Jon 500 [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]], a type of [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] used as currency throughout the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].<ref name="GB:CC" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|You put up a good fight, for a Jedi. I like your style.|Boorka, complimenting Sev'rance Tann|translated=1|audio=BoorkaStylish.flac|<ref name="GB:CC" />}}
Boorka was willing to sell the information on the Decimator to the Separatists in order to make a profit. He had no issue with placing his henchmen in the path leading to his palace to test the Confederate army, allowing them to be killed. After seeing her skill as a military leader, the Hutt complimented Sev'rance Tann of her abilities. Boorka had a strong rivalry with Jabba Desilijic Tiure, which ultimately led to his demise when Jabba informed the Republic of Boorka's operation. When spending time at his palace, Boorka kept a small entourage with him, including both a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] male and female, several [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|guards]], a [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] guard, one [[Droid/Legends|droid]], several [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]], and an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]]. Boorka spoke the [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] [[Language/Legends|language]], and had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin on his backside, no [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and light brown skin on his face and abdomen.<ref name="GB:CC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Boorka the Hutt first appeared in [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']], the [[2002]] expansion to the [[2001]] [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', in which he was voiced by [[Clint Bajakian]]. Boorka appears in the third level of the Separatist campaign, entitled "Perilous Dealings," where the player commands the Separatist forces and destroys the Republic spaceport to secure a deal with Boorka. He later appears in the third level of the Republic campaign, "Never trust a Hutt," during which the player leads the Republic forces and can kill Boorka as an optional side quest. An entry in the game's databank shows a transmission between Boorka and Bogeega Bu'Daay, revealing how he came to find out about the Decimator's existence. Boorka's in-game sprite was the same as that of Jabba the Hutt.<ref name="GB:CC" /> In [[2009]], Boorka was mentioned in ''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'', which stated that the Republic forces slew him.<ref name="CWCG" />
